prompt: Create a moody cinematic editorial portrait of a young man with messy medium-length dark dreadlocks sitting slouched in a worn dark armchair against a gritty teal-gray concrete wall. His face is intentionally obscured by a centered dark blurred square censor block, hiding all facial features. He wears a long deep red overcoat layered over a mustard yellow hoodie, loose baggy plaid cargo pants in red, yellow, and green tones, thick pale blue socks, and red-white-black high-top sneakers resembling classic basketball shoes. Pose him with legs spread wide, elbows resting on knees, hands hanging together in the center with realistic fingers, shoulders relaxed and brooding. Use dramatic low-key studio lighting from the upper left, rich shadows, a textured industrial floor with small debris, desaturated teal background, high contrast, photorealistic detail, 35mm editorial fashion photography, shallow depth of field, centered composition with empty negative space on the left, square 1:1 aspect ratio.
